data.verdict: Gate 2 PASS likely + Gate 4 PASS likely. Strong public revenue evidence: 10 IndieHackers entries (highest: $100k MRR); 5 SEC filing(s). Paid comparables exist at scale — category supports real economics.

sources.contribution: [IndieHackers] 10 IH result(s) for 5 competitor(s) in "focus app"
[FounderTweets] 5 tweet(s) referencing MRR/recurring revenue in category

confidence_note: Serper: live; 4/4 source families returned results. IndieHackers: 10 entries (capped competitor list at 5/5). Founder tweets: 5 result(s) — bias 'conflicted' per spec §4 rule 6 (founder has stake in favorable framing). SEC: 5 filing(s) — most SMB/consumer SaaS won't be public; empty here is normal, not a failure. OpenStartup: 5 page(s) — coverage is thin; many founders publish transparency on personal blogs instead. MRR extraction is opportunistic regex; raw snippets always preserved (never fabricated). Source mix: 2 independent, 2 conflicted.
